name: sample data — mixed pass & fail (offline demo)
_note: Run: python3 -m llmval run examples/sample_suite_with_failures.json --no-judge  — some cases FAIL on purpose so you can see the report.

cases.name: FAIL · age should be integer but model returned a string
PASS · classification label in allowed set
FAIL · model hallucinated a label outside the allowed set
FAIL · answer leaks PII (email + phone)
cases.output: Sure, contact the agent at sara@example.com or +971 50 123 4567.

cases.name: FAIL · model refused instead of answering
cases.output: I'm sorry, I can't help with that request.

cases.name: PASS · paraphrase is lexically close enough to golden
cases.output: Refunds are returned to your original card within five business days.
cases.reference: Refunds go back to the original payment method in about 5 business days.
